LightningComponentBundle.description: Search lookup component. Can either provide a JS reference to a controller, or the name of a controller which implements IF_Search.

property.name: controllerName
property.label: Controller Name
property.description: Name of controller which implements IF_Search.

property.name: name
property.description: Unique identifier of search lookup element
property.label: Unique Element Name

property.name: resultUniqueId
property.label: Individual Result Id
property.description: Property name which uniquely identifies each search result

property.name: addedElementClass
property.label: Added Element Class
property.description: Add SLDS classes to the outermost element

property.name: controllerSearchParameters
property.label: Search Parameters
property.description: Search Parameters to be passed in format e.g. objectName=Foobar__c;maximumNumberOfResults=10.

property.name: controllerName
property.label: Controller Name
property.description: Name of controller which implements IF_Search.

property.name: name
property.description: Unique identifier of search lookup element
property.label: Unique Element Name

property.name: resultUniqueId
property.label: Individual Result Id
property.description: Property name which uniquely identifies each search result

property.name: addedElementClass
property.label: Added Element Class
property.description: Add SLDS classes to the outermost element

property.name: controllerSearchParameters
property.label: Search Parameters
property.description: Search Parameters to be passed in format e.g. objectName=Foobar__c;maximumNumberOfResults=10.
